signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has been confirmed as of April 18, 2026, driving massive capital influx, record XRPL transaction volumes, and heightened institutional adoption amid resolved SEC battles and advancing XRP ETF approvals.[1]
